constitutional_invariant.llm_proposes: Provider assistance remains optional and non-authoritative.
constitutional_invariant.aigol_governs: AiGOL validates result evidence and records evaluation observations without approval or implementation authority.
constitutional_invariant.worker_executes: Worker output remains upstream evidence, not evaluation authority.
constitutional_invariant.replay_records: Result evaluation recorded and returned events are persisted as append-only replay artifacts.

known_limits: Result Evaluation Runtime records observations only.
Improvement Proposal Runtime is not implemented.
Improvement Approval Runtime is not implemented.
Implementation Planning Runtime is not implemented.
Reflection, self-improvement, and self-application remain out of scope.
